feat.name: Adaptive Stratagem
feat.text: Your constant training and strong bond with your allies allow you to change tactics on the fly. Replace one of your prepared expert, mobility, or offensive tactics with another tactic in your folio.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.
